name: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc.
business: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. originates and invests in secured commercial real estate loans, focusing on transitional properties in the Southern U.S. It provides capital to high-quality borrowers and sponsors with business plans for value creation and recapitalization. Its target investments include senior mortgage loans, mezzanine loans, B-notes, CMBS, and preferred equity across asset classes such as multi-family, retail, office, hospitality, industrial, and mixed-use.
sellsTo: High-quality borrowers and sponsors with transitional business plans in commercial real estate
Commercial real estate owners and operators in the Southern U.S.

exposures.sentence: We intend for SUNS investment mix to include loans secured by high quality residential (including multi-family, condominiums and single-family residential communities), retail, office, hospitality, industrial, mixed-use and specialty-use real estate.

We invest in loans which fund the construction of commercial properties. As of December 31, 2025, approximately 44% of the aggregate outstanding principal amount of our portfolio of loans fund the construction of commercial properties.

Our focus is on originating and investing in secured commercial real estate (CRE) loans and providing capital to high-quality borrowers and sponsors with transitional business plans collateralized by CRE assets with opportunities for near-term value creation, as well as recapitalization opportunities.

catalysts.event: Entered into and exited a $21.6 million senior bridge loan to finance acquisition of a ranch in Colorado.
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, the Company and an affiliated co-investor entered into and exited a $21.6 million senior bridge loan to finance the acquisition of a ranch located in Colorado.

catalysts.event: Exercised right to foreclose on the hotel property underlying the San Antonio Loan.
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, the co-lenders exercised their right to foreclose on the hotel property that was the underlying collateral for the San Antonio Loan.

catalysts.event: Entered into a $69.3 million subordinate B-note secured by a portfolio of hotel properties.
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we and an affiliated co-investor entered into a $69.3 million subordinate B-note secured by a portfolio of hotel properties.

catalysts.event: Entered into Amendment Number Seven increasing the aggregate commitment under the Revolving Credit Facility to $165.0 million.
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we entered into Amendment Number Seven to the Loan and Security Agreement ... increased the aggregate commitment by $25.0 million, for a total maximum revolver usage of $165.0 million.

catalysts.event: Declared a regular cash dividend of $0.30 per share for the first quarter of 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, the Company's Board of Directors declared a regular cash dividend of $0.30 per outstanding share of common stock for the first quarter of 2026 to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026, which will be paid on April 15, 2026.

tamClaims.sentence: $2.0 trillion of looming CRE maturities by 2027 will have to be addressed, and capital providers with liquidity and speed of execution will be better positioned to take advantage of this market dislocation.
